case_title: OLIVIA MORFIT ET AL VS. HAIG G MARKIDIAN LLC

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIG G MARKIDIAN LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-13-2021 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,240.00 FILED BY MORFIT, OLIVIA DIBLASI, DANIEL AS TO DEFENDANT HAIG G MARKIDIAN LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER (SC-150)ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL BY DEFENDANT **GRANTED**

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORFIT, OLIVIA DIBLASI, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAIG G MARKIDIAN LLC $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00, DOG FUR CLEANING; NAIL REPAIR IS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-10-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-13-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAIG G MARKIDIAN LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-13-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-13-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFFS OLIVIA MORFIT AND DANIEL DIBLASI ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAIG G MARDIKIAN ENTERPRISES LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY HAIG G. MARDIKIAN WITH WITNESS ROBIN LEVITT, PROPERTY MANAGER. FILING WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
